final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: editorial-graphic
Asset type: WeChat article cover, banner format
Primary request: center-composed banner for fragrance product launch "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香"
Scene/backdrop: soft gradient autumn atmosphere with subtle falling leaves, warm ambient haze
Subject: elegant typographic title "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香" as the dominant focal point, minimalist fragrance bottle silhouette in lower third
Style/medium: premium editorial design, sophisticated luxury aesthetic
Composition/framing: centered composition, title occupying upper-middle visual weight, balanced negative space
Lighting/mood: soft diffused golden hour light, warm and nostalgic autumn mood
Color palette: warm amber, burnt orange, cream white, muted gold accents
Materials/textures: matte paper texture overlay, subtle grain, refined typography
Text (verbatim): "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香"
Constraints: title must be the most prominent element, maintain 900x500 aspect ratio, high-end minimalist aesthetic
Avoid: cluttered layout, cheap gradients, neon colors, busy patterns, watermark
